programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren’t looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish. For their Elimination Challenge, the chefs are woken up by a surprise knock at their door and discover it's time to get cracking on a scrumptious brunch dish they’ll cook in their own rooms and serve to the judges on a roof top terrace!

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Providence encounters a street gang of teenage evos and are shocked to discover that Rex was once a member!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The evil computer ZAG RS returns to take control of all nanites in this nail-biting outer space adventure!

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold’s last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold’s friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. Noted food writer and personal friend of Jonathan Gold, Ruth Reichl serves as guest judge alongside Padma, Tom and Gail.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Ricardo Montalban and Lucie Arnaz are the King and Queen in this Latino version of the fairy tale. Paul Rodriguez is the Jester.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg really lets her hair down as Zenobia, the Hoodoo Diva, who keeps Rapunzel locked in a high tower in the bayou.

programme.title: Must Love Dogs
programme.desc: A lady sets out to change her single status by putting up a personal ad but realises she has too much to handle when men respond to the ad.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: All the campers vie to become Camp Kidney's newest mascot; unfortunately, there can be only one winner.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S2
programme.desc: Edward gets bit by a wood gnome, and he discovers that this is no little mosquito bite!

programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.desc: Mr. J is disgusted with the daily newspaper.

programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel’s in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The Pack is feverishly trying to resurrect Van Kleiss, but they need Rex's help, or the world will succumb to a deadly nanite invasion!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Tiny, metal-munching evo wasps are destroying everything, and Rex and co must stop them.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. Guest Judge Ludo Lefebvre joins Tom, Padma and Gail, as well as guest diners Chefs Ray Garcia, Sara Hymanson, Sarah Kramer and Craig Thornton.

programme.title: Pan
programme.desc: An orphan is spirited away to a magical land, where he finds both fun and dangers, and discovers his destiny — to become the hero who will be known as Peter Pan.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hare didn't hop. He was one of the speediest animals in Tinga Tinga but none of the other animals wanted to race with him because Hare always won and it was becoming boring. Then one day, slow but clever Tortoise decides to challenge Hare. Hare can't believe his luck, but Tortoise wins and he wins and he wins! When Hare realizes that it's not such fun being on the losing end, Tortoise finally lets Hare hop past the finishing line in first place! Well it's not good to win all the time. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Mosquito didn't buzz. Mosquito was as quiet as quiet can be… and did she like to tell tales. One day Mosquito tells the Monkeys that the sun looks very low in the sky. ‘Maybe it's sad and doesn't want to rise!' worry the Monkeys. Mosquito flits off to spread the news - ‘The sun is never going to rise again!' – soon the whole of Tinga Tinga is in complete panic – ‘The Sun is never going to rise again!' Of course, the sun does rise again and all is right again in Tinga Tinga. But the animals decide to tie a grass around Mosquito's tail. From that day on Mosquito buzzes and everyone can swot her away rather than listen to her gossipy tales. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Yumi's Cells

programme.title: The Village Barber
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber’s license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: Dear X

programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: You Can Cook With Sam Kim

programme.title: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: A blind woman struggles to solve a case in which she happens to be a witness

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters who plan to rob a rich merchant

programme.title: Revenger
programme.desc: After waking up and discovering that he has undergone gender reassignment surgery, an assassin seeks to find the doctor responsible.

programme.title: In Our Prime
programme.desc: Follows Ji-woo, an outcast in a prestigious private high school who meets Hak-sung, the school's security guard, and asks him to teach him math and become friends, but their friendship \ is at risk after an incident in school.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: Seoulgoedam (literally meaning “Seoul Ghost Stories”), is a horror anthology film that focuses on Korean folklore that has been passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: Tiger Cage 2
programme.desc: Gangsters pursue a Hong Kong lawman framed for murder and a lawyer they believe is linked to laundered money.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: A former US Federal Agent must abandon the witness protection program and come out of hiding when his London home is invaded in error due to a wrong address.

programme.title: Brothers In Heaven
programme.desc: Twin brothers separated at birth grow up on opposite sides of the law. Twenty years after they were separated, they meet again, one as a cop while the other as a high rank criminal

programme.title: In The Line Of Duty 4
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop and two American cops are onto a suspected harbor worker and are forced to team up when they discover that the suspect is a witness on the run from the CIA

programme.title: The Hollow Point
programme.desc: A retired lawman works with a new sheriff when a botched Mexican drug deal and a vicious hit man threaten their border town.

programme.title: Legendary Amazons
programme.desc: In early 11th century China, the Song Dynasty is being invaded by armies of the rival state Western Xia. Yang, the last of a long line of Song generals, is killed and his widowed wife Mu leads other widows into battle to save their dynasty.

programme.title: The Wailing
programme.desc: Suspicion leads to hysteria when rural villagers link a series of brutal murders to the arrival of a mysterious stranger

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon
programme.desc: A man visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: The winter is mild and wet, which is good news for some but bad news for others. Red deer are forced to higher ground, salmon have gone six months without food, mountain hares turn a conspicuous white, and squirrels kick their own young out of the nest.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Join host Jolie as she unravels the secrets of Taiwan nightlife in this captivating episode of Taiwan Top 5.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores Taiwan's top five alternative therapies and learns about those keeping traditional ways of healing alive today.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Jolie explores Taiwan's top five Western food with a Taiwanese twist. Join her as she learns why these have become so popular among locals and tourists alike.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Jolie explores top five temples to visit in Taipei. Join her as she learns about the deities worshipped in these temples and what people pray for at each.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise’s stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: P!nk: Fearless
programme.desc: Pink is a powerhouse of pop and rock music. Although initially seen as yet another act in the late 90’s crowd of teen pop acts, she has since gone on to define her own genre and solidified her place as a standout from the rest. She is a force to be reckoned with in the music scene.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood: Southern Grace
programme.desc: From a small-town farm in Checotah, Oklahoma, to the biggest stages in the world — Carrie Underwood’s journey is the story of a dream, a voice, and a fire that couldn’t be ignored. This is the story of Carrie Underwood — the all-American girl who became a living legend.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Dance Or Die
programme.desc: From underground clubs to global superstardom, Lady Gaga: Dance or Die explores the unstoppable rise of the pop icon who redefined music, fashion, and fame. Through triumphs and tribulations, witness how Gaga danced through life’s challenges — and won.

programme.title: Kylie Minogue: Pop Icon
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the extraordinary life and career of Kylie Minogue, from her early days on the Australian soap opera "Neighbours" to her rise as a global music sensation.

programme.title: Julia Roberts: Pretty Iconic
programme.desc: Discover the extraordinary life of Julia Roberts, Hollywood’s beloved icon. From her breakout role in Pretty Woman to her Oscar-winning performances, this documentary explores her journey, enduring charm, and impact on cinema, capturing the heart of an unforgettable star.

programme.title: Helen Mirren: Queen Of Stage And Screen
programme.desc: This documentary explores Helen Mirren’s fearless career, tracing her journey from a humble upbringing to becoming a global icon. It covers her early successes in the world of theatre as well as her wide range of film and television roles.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Julia Roberts’ Pretty Woman costume designer Marilyn Vance, Michael Collins producer Stephen Woolley, The Hollywood Reporter’s Scott Feinberg, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Arnold Schwarzenegger’s Eraser director Chuck Russell, Conan The Destroyer co-star Sarah Douglas, Hercules In New York director Arthur Allan Seidelman, plus many more.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: See ancient sea caves, modern golf courses, mysterious formations, and treacherous predators along Africa's South Coast.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.title: Art And Design
programme.desc: What is design without art and what is art without design? How about combining the two of them? Explore the world of crafts and convention for the construction and the skeleton behind the beauty and concept of fashion.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: In Chile's Torres del Paine melt from snow-covered mountains feeds finger-like fjords as they reach out to the sea to join the current lowering its salinity. Rivers estuaries and wetlands are home to many wading birds and the countless inlets and bays are magnets for rare dolphins and orcas.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When both Sam and Gabriel pre-order the new Commander Kale comic but the supplier only sends one copy, TZG secretly ferries the comic book back and forth between readers. / When Fawna teaches a silent yoga class, TZG secretly find and remove a loud chirping cricket from the Community Center.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as “Mandy Monkhuahua”; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss scours Chicago to find his old co-worker nemesis Board Member Bradley, his key to cutting a deal with the Federal Agents for his freedom. However, he must lose the tail of Canada’s most notorious fugitive tracker, a trained bear cub named Henri. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Stormfly is captured by a new enemy, Ryker Grimborn, and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup, Toothless and the team must rescue her before it's too late

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: As Hiccup and Snotlout race to rescue the others from Ryker and the Dragon Hunters, they don't realize Dagur and Heather are working with the enemy

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Tired of the Melvins ruling the school, the boys realize that they need Mr. Krupp to make the school at least bearable. Unfortunately, Krupp has run off to Ecuador to look for a fabled fountain. So the boys form the M.I.S.F.A.R.T.S. - Mega Incredible Search Force Adventure Rescue Team Squad - to travel to Ecuador and bring Krupp back, whether he wants it or not.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: A bummed out Tina takes a vacation to the baby resort, Floaties! However, her mind is still back at work, and struggled to actually enjoy her vacation. And it gets worse when Crispin Biscuits switches electronic ID tags with her, causing everyone to assume Tina actually is Crispin Biscuits. With Crispin having booked her for a seemingly endless stay, Tina is trapped in a paradise nightmare, and in a tunnel of madness starts to think that she may even be Crispin.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits heists the underwater Baby Bank in an attempt to steal all the funds from Boss and Tina’s new company. Boss, Tina and Banker Baby Benny must infiltrate the bank via submarine to stop this high-stakes aquatic robbery. But Boss and Tina struggle to stay on the same page after Tina admits that she might, kinda, sorta be thinking about retiring as a regular baby.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Crispin Biscuits changes the Baby Love economy to reward companies for bringing in baby hate, Boss Baby is forced to make himself the most hated baby in town to save their startup company. Meanwhile, Tina needs to end Crispin Biscuits’ attacks on their company before she can finally hang up her boss role and retire to a life of cuddle time with daddy and mommy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: The PALs are determined to place first in a race for the coveted Frontier Fillies Legacy Pin. But the BUDs are willing to do anything to win.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: While riding back to Miradero, the girls get lost -- and Abigail's horse gets bitten by a snake! Can an old friend's skills help save the day?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: After finding a majestic horse in the wild, Lucky and the girls set out to solve the mystery of where she came from -- and where she truly belongs.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Tired of settling disputes between Valleyites, Grug invents “Chance,” a two-sided rock that can be flipped to determine all decisions in the Valley; In a nature documentary-style, Thunk tells the story of Beary, a peaceful Thunk-like cub that struggles to fit into a violent bear owl culture

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: After being called out for having commitment issues by Grug, Gran decides to make the ultimate commitment: marrying Mow!; After embarrassingly choking at the prior Valley's “beastie Pageant”, Eep asks previous winner Gran to train her to be the best

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a new dragon is found in Edge Cove, the Dragon Riders must help the Sea Shocker escape a group of hungry Scauldrons

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Skrill returns with a vendetta against Hiccup and Toothless, the Dragon Riders must choose a new course of action to stop the vicious dragon

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Uncuddleables have struck the Lil Dumpling baby pageant, replacing all of Baby Corp's super-cute top 5%er babies with not-cute bottom 5%ers. Boss, Tina and their field team race to caravan the 5%ers from their homes to the pageant before Nannycam deploys the nuclear option of unleashing the dangerously cute UBO on stage to salvage a Lil Dumpling win.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss Baby and Tina reject the 5%er system that says the cuter you are, the more love you deserve. Teaming up with the Uncuddleables, the team tries to take down the system from within, forming a resistance of the eight department heads of Baby Corp in the hopes of changing the way we look at Baby Love forever.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Castle of Lions mysteriously turns against the Paladins, forcing Princess Allura to make a difficult sacrifice to save Team Voltron.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Team Voltron infiltrates a hidden Galra Space Station to investigate why Zarkon is attacking planets and siphoning the life energy from the universe

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky enlists Abigail Turo Snips and their horses to help plan a surprise birthday party for Pru that goes disastrously wrong

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hare didn't hop. He was one of the speediest animals in Tinga Tinga but none of the other animals wanted to race with him because Hare always won and it was becoming boring. Then one day, slow but clever Tortoise decides to challenge Hare. Hare can't believe his luck, but Tortoise wins and he wins and he wins! When Hare realizes that it's not such fun being on the losing end, Tortoise finally lets Hare hop past the finishing line in first place! Well it's not good to win all the time. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Mosquito didn't buzz. Mosquito was as quiet as quiet can be… and did she like to tell tales. One day Mosquito tells the Monkeys that the sun looks very low in the sky. ‘Maybe it's sad and doesn't want to rise!' worry the Monkeys. Mosquito flits off to spread the news - ‘The sun is never going to rise again!' – soon the whole of Tinga Tinga is in complete panic – ‘The Sun is never going to rise again!' Of course, the sun does rise again and all is right again in Tinga Tinga. But the animals decide to tie a grass around Mosquito's tail. From that day on Mosquito buzzes and everyone can swot her away rather than listen to her gossipy tales. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Marsha decides to be a mechanic but wears Big Chris out with her endless questions. Disaster strikes when Chris dozes off and doesn't listen to her properly…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The loudspeaker system is not working at Silver Hatch. How will Roary be stopped from performing a dangerous stunt on the track?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris has a clear out and takes all his old junk up to Farmer Green's car boot sale but misses the clutter in Rusty. How will he get everything back?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris takes the cars to the beach to relax in the heat but he is so busy dealing with the cars he forgets to drink his water. But hang on, who else has drunk it…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Flash invites everyone to a tea party, thinking they bring the food with them. Are there going to be a lot of hungry bunnies at Silver hatch?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After he’s rescued from a cave, a charismatic old lemur challenges Julien to an election for the throne.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien believes Mort is the son he never knew he had – despite the fact that Mort is two years older than him.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.desc: The “Below Deck” franchise voyages to the deep blue waters of the Mediterranean Sea in “Below Deck Mediterranean.” The series follows the crewmembers aboard a private luxury yacht as they provide first-class service to wealthy guests during the charter season. In each episode, the team encounters a new group of well-to-do clients with challenging requests and lofty expectations. The young crewmembers must learn to work together as they face the inevitable drama that comes with sharing close quarters. While demanding, the job offers the crew the chance to experience the spectacular sights, sounds and tastes of the Mediterranean.

At the heart of each case is a pressing question: was the victim's demise the result of an accident, suicide, or possibly murder? programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Queen's House
programme.desc: A revenge story about a woman in the top 1% starting over from the ground up to reclaim her stolen life and find her true 'home'. A passionate drama of people striving to regain the true meaning of life.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc:
In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced.
Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong.
This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: ROUND PLAYLIST
programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: Dogs Are Incredible 2
programme.desc: The training academy from Dogs Are Incredible! For pet owners struggling with issues like biting, aggression, or excessive barking from their beloved dogs who've become part of the family. Experts from various fields provide customized training methods and tailored advice — helping unruly dogs transform into well-behaved companions!

programme.title: Walking On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Eunsoo was an ordinary wife and mother who never broke a rule. But when her husband is given a death sentence by illness, her daughter walks away from school, and the family home is about to be taken, life leaves her cornered. Then, a bag stuffed with drugs falls into her hands like a fate. To save her family, she makes a choice she can't turn back from.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: Phi, a veteran boxer, sets out on a quest for revenge after the ruthless crime lord Ba Rau killed his wife. His journey takes him into the remote village near Foggy Mountain, where he discovers Ba Rau's human trafficking activities. The final showdown is inevitable as Phi must take down Ba Rau to save the villagers and avenge his wife’s death.

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Fist of Legend

Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth “pagoda” with precision knife work.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining nine home cooks are tasked with firing up their grills and preparing a restaurant quality barbecue plate that is guaranteed to impress the judges.

programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits as Theresa invites viewers to peek behind the curtain of her gift, being on tour, as well as surprising clients and never-before-seen readings.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: On day two, the Dokbakz head to Jervis Bay, a popular vacation spot for locals. This time, they are in for something special: their first-ever road trip with a rental car to their destination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's our contestant's final day in Doha, and they have been granted one last chance at immunity. With only one more spot plus a big prize, Sarah, Alana, Depinder, Snezana and Laura must battle it out.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael loves gazpacho, a cold soup made from raw vegetables that is perfect for warm Italian summers. She's holding onto the sunshine with her delicious recipe for green tomato gazpacho.

programme.desc: After a 1,536km journey, the Earth-Cleaning Bros arrive in Olang Ol, a pristine nomadic village. They build their own ger and even try milking yaks!

programme.title: Never Not Love You
programme.desc: It tells the story of young lovers who tries to build a life together until career opportunities sends them to a different country where their relationship will be tested.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Masamang Ugat
programme.desc: Two brothers are separated after their mother dies. One becomes a cop (Mikey Arroyo), the other an assassin (Ace Vergel). The cop ambitiously wants to bring down a drug lord supported by politicians, while the assassin works for the same drug lord.

programme.title: Ang Erpat Kong Astig
programme.desc: At a relatively young age, Joe Cuartero (JinggoyEstrada) is already a widower. With his wife gone, Joe’s life is now centered on his young daughter Tweety (Bea Bueno).

programme.title: Wangbu
programme.desc: Dodong (Jay Manalo) moves his family to Manila in search for a better life. But his dream for a brighter future starts crumbling when he catches his son sniffing solvent.

programme.title: Sisterakas
programme.desc: The childhoods of Bernice (Vice Ganda) & Detty (Ai-Ai Delas Alas) were world's apart, but they did have one thing in common: their father. Headed by the eccentric yet equally brilliant & talented Roselle (Kris Aquino) the competition gets tougher, and a string of events lead to the two company heads fighting over the once expendable Detty.

programme.title: Hindi Tayo Pwede
programme.desc: Gabby (Lovi Poe) finds love in a man who is also named Gabby (Tony Labrusca) and shares a long and deep friendship with Dennis (Marco Gumabao).

programme.title: Dahil May Isang Ikaw
programme.desc: Anya (Regine Velasquez) accidentally bumps Andrew's (Aga Muhlach) car while backing up. Both were arguing whose fault it was. Later Anya discovers that Andrew is her client and she apologizes. She offers to treat him out to dinner. This becomes the start of the proverbial beautiful friendship.

programme.title: Bullet Day
programme.desc: A former hit man trying to live a normal life when someone from his past sees him and puts his family and friends in danger. Can he sacrifice his new life to fight for the ones he loves?

programme.title: Mapanukso
programme.desc: Carlo (Gereld Lauron) is a kind and obedient son who just happen to earn a living as a macho dancer in a gay bar. Fate intervenes when he meets Jerome (Emilio Garcia), a gay production manager, who helps him alleviate his underprivileged life.

programme.title: Kamandag ng Droga
programme.desc: An all-too-real film on the country's current war on drugs, the film tackles the angle of the family members and community of addicts and pushers.

programme.title: Xenoa 2
programme.desc: XENOA 2 : Clash of the Bloods is the story of Clyde who suddenly discovers his power, being the son of Drix, one of the three Royal siblings from the planet Xenoa. The other siblings- Eli and Zeus learned that Clyde started to act strange and unfortunate things are happening around.

programme.title: Magnum Muslim .357
programme.desc: A Muslim undercover cop, Lieutenant Jamal Razul a.k.a Magnum (ER Ejercito) tracks down a criminal syndicate behind the kidnapping of the Muslim Princess Ameerah (Sam Pinto). Aided by fellow officer Joselito Ibanez (Jerico Ejercito), Razul discovers that there’s more to the kidnapping than mere ransom.

programme.title: Mission Impossible S2 E07 - Operation Heart
programme.desc: New IMF leader Jim Phelps has his team for the next covert mission: Cinnamon Carter is the female seductress, Rollin Hand is the master of disguise, Willie Armitage is the muscle, and Barney Collier is the electronics whiz.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S2 E06 - Warrior… Princess… Tramp
programme.desc: Xena, one of the fiercest, sexiest, most self-empowered women as she travels defending the innocent from the forces of darkness. She is the very definition of girl power.

programme.title: The Waltons S3 E17 - The Matchmakers
programme.desc: Eldest son, John-Boy Walton, makes the family proud as he starts his first year in college, pursuing his dream of becoming a writer--a course that is both challenging and rewarding for John-Boy and the entire Walton family.Younger siblings Jason and Mary Ellen Walton discover the professions to which they will devote their lives in this heartwarming drama about growing up in the loving embrace of a large Appalachia family.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff and his team's search for the wrecks of Mary, Joseph, and Neptune takes them further into uncharted territory. Jeff begins to suspect he may be on the verge of uncovering a field of stolen treasure.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: An advanced radar experiment conducted high above the Mesa and Triangle reveals evidence that an incredible theory about Skinwalker Ranch could actually be true.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: New evidence is being discovered that completely upends our understanding of this ancient culture... and might provide evidence that the Maya came in contact with extraterrestrial visitors.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: The battle for the Everglades becomes personal for Troy and Pickle. Bill and Tes venture further north than ever before. Zak and Aaron visit Zak's childhood stomping grounds.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: One of China's oldest provinces with history that reaches back over 4,000 years. Anthony explores hanging coffins, wineries, and a bomb shelter.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: New evidence is being discovered that completely upends our understanding of this ancient culture... and might provide evidence that the Maya came in contact with extraterrestrial visitors.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: A forgotten manuscript in a dusty trunk. A royal tomb hidden for millennia beneath the sands. These finds prove history’s greatest treasures often resurface when least expected.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff and his team's search for the wrecks of Mary, Joseph, and Neptune takes them further into uncharted territory. Jeff begins to suspect he may be on the verge of uncovering a field of stolen treasure.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: Legendary beasts are believed to roam the earth, terrorising, killing, and even possessing humans. But are these creatures merely metaphors or is there proof they've actually been unleashed to wreak havoc?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: When an indigenous sound ritual is performed on Skinwalker Ranch, the team is amazed by the phenomena that are revealed.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos' search for treasure-filled, lost Nazi U-Boats takes an unexpected turn when a 98-year-old local eyewitness gives him a tip that changes the course of his investigation.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro travels north of the Arctic Circle with his team of sled dogs to hunt caribou; Daniel rebuilds an old floating cabin using driftwood logs and the power of tides.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The team is thrilled yet concerned when the investigation of the Golden Egg, an area that scientific evidence suggests the legendary riches are hidden in, immediately shows signs that it may be collapsing.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team heads to a target they believe to be the long-lost Marine Sulphur Queen. This massive tanker disappeared in 1963 with a crew of 39 and is one of the most iconic missing Bermuda Triangle wrecks.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S12)
programme.desc: Tom packs a traditional muzzleloader on a winter deer hunt with Sean and Hank. Jake and Anika complete a successful elk hunt. Aron and Jen cut down dead trees that threaten to destroy their cabin.

programme.desc: Athleisure is conquering the world! Everyone looks like having just finished a work-out in the gym, while grabbing a cappuccino. If this lifestyle is yours, be first to discover the must-haves!

programme.title: Fashion & Sports
programme.desc: Athleisure is conquering the world! Everyone looks like having just finished a work-out in the gym, while grabbing a cappuccino. If this lifestyle is yours, be first to discover the must-haves!

programme.title: Beauty
programme.desc: Get inspired with the latest trends in hairstyles, enjoy the tips and tricks of the top makeup artists and get the best use of the exclusive guide in the world of skincare products!

programme.title: Fashion From Japan
programme.desc: Get your impression about the Japanese fashion heavyweighters and emerging designers which are pushing the envelope of style and creating amazing, high-quality products.

programme.title: Fashion From Japan
programme.desc: Get your impression about the Japanese fashion heavyweighters and emerging designers which are pushing the envelope of style and creating amazing, high-quality products.

programme.title: Prada
programme.desc: A time-honored iconic fashion house Prada isn't only for the devil, it is forever in fashion having the final word in high-minded bohemian luxury fashion due to its timeless conceptual cult products

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: Disciples Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Yi is a skilled disciple of the Hong Quan style kung fu who work in a textile mill recommended by his senior, Han. Han warns Yi not to show off his martial arts skill so as to avoid getting into trouble. However, Yi does not listen and eventually gets dangerously involved in the conflict between two opposing textile mills.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Wei Chun is a cocky young man sentenced to jail for killing a man in a fight. One day, Wei Chun picks a fight with a seemingly defenseless old man who completely thrashes him! The old man turns out to be the master of monkey style kung fu and as they become friends, he gives Wei Chun half of a medallion that would direct him to hidden secrets.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general’s escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Heroes Of Sung stars one of the original kung fu ladies of the silver screen, Shih Szu, who plays swordswoman Meng Hung. She must work with Fan Tien-Fu, played by Lo Lieh to find and protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty. Shih's magnificent performance earned her the female hero role in another hit Dracula And The 7 Golden Vampires.

programme.title: Relentless Fury
programme.desc: Captain Lin Lang and his elite mercenary team are tasked with escorting a mysterious woman safely home. Bearing the highest bounty in dark web history, she draws assassins from across the globe. Among them is the notorious fugitive Ray. Now, Lin and his team must survive a deadly fight to complete their mission.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: What Price Honesty
programme.desc: In this period martial arts thriller, three police graduates are assigned to a town rife with crimes and corruption. They vow to uphold justice but are hampered by their corrupt superior, resulting in them putting their lives and the lives of their beloved in danger.

programme.title: Justice, My Foot!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays Sung, a lawyer who uses any means necessary to help his wealthy clients escape the law. Sung retires to the countryside when urged by his wife, but when Mrs Sung encounters a woman whose husband's death has been covered up by corrupted officials, Sung returns to the court for justice to be served.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: Remember What I Forgot
programme.desc: Struggling with Alzheimer's disease, Hong Kong film buff Kim relies on his brother to manage their appliance repair shop. Kim's quirky behaviour prompts producer Ginger to suspect that he may be a film critic trying to profit from harsh reviews. Posing as a friend, Ginger uncovers Kim's secrets and sorrows as she gets closer to him and his family.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong’s hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: The Myth
programme.desc: An archaeologist Jack, and a scientist William, stumble upon ancient Qin Dynasty artifacts that lead them to the mausoleum and mysteriously connects Jack to his past life as a warrior in ancient China, starting their mythical journey.

programme.title: Kailangan Ko'y Ikaw
programme.desc: Francine Natra (Regine Velasquez) and Gimo Talumpati (Robin Padilla) crossed paths when Gimo won the "Date With A Star" contest thus taking the popular Francine on a special date. But their fairytale love story struggled when the relationship went public.

programme.title: Oscar Ramos, Hitman
programme.desc: Oscar Ramos (Ramon Revilla) is a respected man in the community. He settles disputes and takes up the cudgels for the oppressed. He also has a secret -- an amulet that protects him from bullets. Will his amulet protect him when both the police and Ka Ernie's group hunt him down?

programme.title: Diego
programme.desc: He is a member of an elite crop in the military. However,when his group decided to stage a coup against the government,he defied his head. What danger lurks in the jungle makes Diego a stark study of human fortitude and courage?

programme.title: Ma'am, May We Go Out (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Tito, Vic and Joey were lazy bums who would inherit a fortune if they would be able to graduate from high school. It was not easy but it helped that the P.E. teacher is Carmi Martin.

programme.title: Subukan Kami Kung Kaya Nyo
programme.desc: Subukan Kami Kung Kaya Nyo

programme.title: Okey Si Ma'am
programme.desc: Keempee, Donna, Paco and Lander played high school senior students each having their own personal dilemmas. Ms. Sonia (Alice Dixson), with her unorthodox way of teaching became their counselor and friend who brought out the best in her students.

programme.title: Cara Y Cruz
programme.desc: Berting was an escaped convict. Boggart was a cab driver whom he took hostage when he bolted from jail. The two of them landed in a primitive island where all of the inhabitants were under the control of a religious cult.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: This is the story of four women in the glamorous world of fashion, about their friendships, their loves, and their careers.

programme.title: Laging Umaga
programme.desc: Teresa (Gina Pareño) is pregnant by her rich boyfriend Edwin (George Estregan). But Edwin is sent away to manage their provincial plant by his father (Don Lauro) to stop the impending unsuitable match. Father and son agree that if after two years and Edwin is still in love with Teresa, Don Lauro will no longer oppose the marriage.

programme.title: Isla Paraiso
programme.desc: A series of inexplicable and mind-boggling twists of incidents inside the hacienda take place as the animosity between two sisters heightens.

programme.title: Psycho Sex Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose. And the victims have one thing in common --- they are all in the care of the same psychiatrist.

programme.title: Bokyo
programme.desc: Bokyo's parents fight all the time and neglect their son's basic needs. He leaves home despite reassurances from his alien friend, Starking, that everything will turn out for the best.

programme.title: Bakit Iisa Lamang Ang Puso?
programme.desc: The death of tycoon Ernesto Benitez left behind two daughters of different mothers. One was the ambitious Diane, who wanted recognition from her father's family and the other one was Jessica, whose privileged existence was shattered with the emergence of her half-sister.

programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Encased in a huge chocolate bunny, Humdinger is carried away by hungry raccoons and ends up floating in Adventure Bay with a curious dolphin. // When a magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help. // The Pups must save Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Toodles the Clown's tiny clown car.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 13
programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait and tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo, and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 5
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout. Andall bets are off when a bidding war over endangered species taxidermy ends in a heated stand-off with the local authorities.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: The West Wing S1 13
programme.desc: Bartlet's position on gay rights is called into question.

programme.desc: Explore hacks for all ages, from staying clean while eating ribs, to staying young in your golden years. Plus, watch hacks for making soap and hanging shelves, and get ready to welcome the twist tie to the All Star Club.

programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 7
programme.desc: Jesse taunts Brandon and Lori in the hopes of instigating a fight and later unearths a ticking treasure. Then, seasoned local Victor throws down his bankroll for a trove of luxury goods, but are they actually knock-offs? And later, Brandon and Lori think they've hit the jackpot with a cache of firearms, but when Lori's gun accidentally goes off inside the locker, Brandon is caught in the crosshairs.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S1 8
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori return to Boston and square off against his former protege Wade. The bad blood may just erupt into a full-out brawl on the auction floor. Then, a former military hero goes all in on a locker that turns out to be hiding the ultimate score. And later, the contents of a unit spark an outrage among the buyers, but Brandon only sees dollar signs. Will he walk away or will this controversial cache crush his morals?

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 8
programme.desc: A dancing accountant takes on a bouncing boater and a shooter faces a man-child with moves.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 4
programme.desc: Feel the adrenaline rush with 20 of the dumbest daredevils ever caught on film. We've got base jumpers, bull riders, tightrope walkers, even an alligator wrangler. And they all have one thing in common - hilarious fails. With hair-raising commentaryfrom our celebrity cast, including Leif Garrett, Todd Bridges and Chelsea Peretti.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 14
programme.desc: Michael unveils the ancient mystery behind bowling balls, and later does the world's longest spit-take! Plus, LITERALLY THE BIGGEST special guest in the show's history, a.k.a. Shaquille O'Neal, helps with a plan to blow one superfan's mind!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 15
programme.desc: While posing as a cook, Michael warms up his vocal chords to serenade a clam out of its shell, and later, he shocks his sous chef with a fish stick stowaway. Plus, a spirited trick leaves one man questioning the afterlife.

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster learns teamwork makes the dream work! He works with his team to win a soccer game & escape a maze!

programme.title: Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Buster is on a family adventure! He makes dinner with Grandpa, chases a kite with Daddy & goes camping!

programme.title: The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: The whole crew is to the rescue! They save a stranded Blue, help Kat in an out-of-control car & make a beach!

programme.title: Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has creative fixes for funny feelings! He cheers up a sad Fiona & paints a bus to help an anxious Mech!

programme.title: Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: Learn healthy habits on the farm! Ella learns to wash her hands, eat veggies & how to recycle!

programme.title: Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: Let's sing, dance & play on the farm! The friends learn the ABCs, dance & have a splash competition!

programme.title: A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: It's a special day for Jill! She makes a new friend at the playground & finds her talent in arts & crafts!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Cooking & Fun!
programme.desc: It's cooking & fun! The siblings plan a surprise date for parents, make a bubble machine & try ketchup!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: It's time to help out! JJ pretends to be a doctor, bakes a cake for Mom & goes on a nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: It's a dance party on the move! JJ sings "Wheels on the Bus," pretends to be a train & a brave firefighter!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an outdoor adventure! JJ races monster trucks, plays in a water park & sings with a Bananaphone!

programme.title: Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: It's a creative farm adventure! Ella brings school to the barn, makes delicious jam & does some stargazing!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a big day of rescues! The crew puts out a barn fire, saves a friend from an avalanche & fixes a clock!

programme.title: Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: It's construction chaos! The crew builds a house upside down & finds dinosaur bones in a roundabout!

programme.title: Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Feel good & stay safe with KiiYii! They learn how to brush their teeth & how to be safe while riding a bike!

programme.title: Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: Let's play the best games with KiiYii! They play Red Light Green Light, Snakes & Ladders & Marco Polo!

programme.title: A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: It's an ocean clean-up day! Super Shark recycles rubbish & the family builds a ball pit from recycled items!

programme.title: Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: It's an underwater learning adventure! The Sharksons sing the ABCs, learn colors & brush their shark teeth!

programme.title: A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: It's a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! She learns about cloud shapes & makes the moon sneeze stardust!

programme.title: A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: It's a super creative day of play! Twinkle makes music with toadstools, paints a picture & plays with toys!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: JJ plays his favorite games! He plays freeze dance, makes funny faces & builds with construction vehicles!

programme.title: JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams!
programme.desc: JJ's having a splashin' dance party! He plays freeze dance at the beach & learns his ABCs under the sea!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ learns that sharing is caring! He shares snacks with siblings, plays baseball & makes rainbow popsicles!

programme.title: An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: The Minibods go on an adventure! Lulu misses her bunny on a camping trip & Newt learns to ride without pedals!

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is stopping Weasel's wacky schemes! He catches Weasel cheating in a football match & stealing a battery!

programme.title: Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: It's a day of epic rescues & Weasel's fails! Gecko saves a flying monster truck filled with Weasel's helium!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a super fun day on the farm! Ella plays "Mummy Duck," learns animal sounds & adopts a cat!

programme.title: Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's make, play & learn with JJ! He makes his own pizza, creates fresh fruit ice cream & fixes his toy bus!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing with JJ & his animal friends! They perform "Old Macdonald" & a play version of "Hey Diddle Diddle"!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Family Adventures
programme.desc: Nina has family adventures! She visits a petting zoo, races her brother & learns about planes from Dad!

programme.title: A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: It's a special day for Jill! She makes a new friend at the playground & finds her talent in arts & crafts!

programme.title: When I Grow Up I Want To Be!
programme.desc: What does Baby John want to be? He visits a fire station, learns about police officers & road safety!

programme.title: A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi learns how to have a healthy day! He learns about sunscreen, pizza-making & the benefits of sleep!

programme.title: Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering big questions! He learns how to brush teeth, why we sneeze & how spiders make their webs!

programme.title: When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Arpo's imagination runs wild! He thinks he's a pirate, builds a rollercoaster & battles a jelly monster!

programme.title: Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Daniel cause chaos all over town! They have a wild supermarket chase & a messy picnic!

programme.title: Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: JJ's on a sky-high adventure! He blasts off to the moon, trains as a firefighter & chases a lost balloon!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Cody's New Sister!
programme.desc: Cody welcomes his new sister! He learns he's a big brother, helps Kendi sleep & plays peek-a-boo!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Bedtime Stories & Fun!
programme.desc: It's bedtime fun! JJ has a slumber party, helps find 5 little ducks & sings "Happy and You Know It"!

programme.title: Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are solving mysteries! They find a stolen necklace & travel to the future!

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.desc: A female cop moves into a small town, and gets drawn to a case that involves a girl who is possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: Sari Saring Sine: Campus Girls
programme.desc: Vangie, Georgie, Samantha and Diane are best of friends who encounter different journeys in life as they go through college. Their friendship gets tested when Diane and Georgie fight over the affections of college heartthrob Louie, while Samantha discovers that Vangie is her dad's young mistress.

programme.title: Hapi House Season 1 ep 3
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Ha-pi House is a home away from home for a group of single half-Pinoys and Pinoys born and raised overseas who have come home to rediscover their Filipino roots.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 222
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.
